title: bupleurum lancifolium
intro: Bupleurum lancifolium, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or simply bupleurum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine, known for its medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bupleurum lancifolium include reducing fever, relieving rheumatoid arthritis, and improving liver function, making it a popular herb in Chinese herbal medicine. Bupleurum lancifolium can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
